name: Voyager 1
summary: First spacecraft to enter interstellar space (2012). Carries the Golden Record.

name: Voyager 2
summary: Only spacecraft to have flown by all four giant planets. Crossed the heliopause in 2018.

name: JWST
summary: James Webb Space Telescope. Halo orbit around Sun-Earth L2; largest infrared observatory ever flown.

name: Parker Solar Probe
summary: First spacecraft to 'touch' the Sun — repeated perihelia inside the corona using Venus gravity assists.

name: New Horizons
summary: First flyby of Pluto (2015) and the Kuiper Belt object Arrokoth (2019). Heading out of the solar system.

name: Juno
summary: Polar orbiter at Jupiter mapping its gravity, magnetic field, and aurorae.

name: Lucy
summary: First mission to the Jupiter Trojan asteroids — eight targets across a 12-year tour.

name: BepiColombo
summary: Joint ESA/JAXA Mercury mission — two orbiters arriving via flybys of Earth, Venus, and Mercury.
